snippets.title: ESM module with env and built-ins
snippets.explanation: ESM import, process.env for secrets, and the promise-based fs API with top-level await.

snippets.title: CommonJS equivalent
snippets.explanation: The same task in CommonJS using require and the synchronous fs API.

snippets.title: A minimal CLI reading argv
snippets.explanation: process.argv exposes CLI arguments; npm scripts standardize how the tool is run.
